zh.Errol, Perth, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭培爾埃羅爾

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gilbert de la Haye 5th Lord of Erroll, Constable of Scotland於1270年出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安格雷布利其時，他的父親Nicholas de la Haye Baron of Errol11267歲，母親Joan37歲。他於1289年與Margaret Graham of Menteith在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1333年4月享年63歲。

zh-hans.Lochorwart castle, Buchan, Aberdeenshire: 苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gilbert de la Haye 5th Lord of Erroll, Constable of Scotland于1270年出生在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安格雷布利其时，他的父亲Nicholas de la Haye Baron of Errol11267岁，母亲Joan37岁。他于1289年与Margaret Graham of Menteith在苏格兰米德洛迪安结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1333年4月享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Haye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Willi.

North German, East Frisian, and Dutch: from a personal name, Frisian Hajo, ancient Germanic Haio; or from a short form of the female name Hadewig, composed of the elements hadu ‘battle, strife’ + wīg ‘war’.
German: variant of   Hey   4, 5.

variants.name: Deshayes
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from the plural of Old French haye ‘hedge’ (see Haye and Hayes ), with fused preposition and definite article des ‘from the’; or a habitational name denoting someone from Les Hayes, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Deshaies .

variants.name: Hayenga
meanings: East Frisian: patronymic from the personal name Hajo (see Haye 1). It is formed with the suffix -enga, a variant of -inga (from the patronymic suffix -ing and genitive plural ending -a).

variants.name: Hey
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hay  .
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized (or archaic) and Flemish, of Heij, a topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, Dutch hei, heide.
German: metonymic occupational name for a grower or mower of grass, from Middle High German höu ‘grass, hay’.

variants.name: Hayen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse.  German Heinz, Wilhelm.
Flemish, East Frisian, and North German: patronymic from   Haye   1.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gilbert de la Haye 5th Lord of Erroll, Constable of Scotland was born in 1270, in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas de la Haye Baron of Errol, was 11267 and his mother, Joan, was 37. He married Margaret Graham of Menteith in 1289, in Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in April 1333, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gilbert de la Haye 5th Lord of Erroll, Constable of Scotland est né en 1270, à Gorebridge, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas de la Haye Baron of Errol, avait 11267 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Graham of Menteith en 1289, à Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en avril 1333, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gilbert de la Haye 5th Lord of Erroll, Constable of Scotland 1270 in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de la Haye Baron of Errol 11267 und seine Mutter Joan 37. Er hat 1289 in Midlothian, Scotland Margaret Graham of Menteith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb im April 1333 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert de la Haye 5th Lord of Erroll, Constable of Scotland è nato il nel 1270 nel Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas de la Haye Baron of Errol, aveva 11267 anni e il suo madre, Joan, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Graham of Menteith nel 1289, nel Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel aprile 1333, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de la Haye 5th Lord of Erroll, Constable of Scotlandが1270年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンゴアブリッジで生まれた時，父Nicholas de la Haye Baron of Errolは11267歳，母Joanは37歳であった。1289年にスコットランドミドロスアンでMargaret Graham of Menteithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1333年4月に63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert de la Haye 5th Lord of Erroll, Constable of Scotland(이)가 1270년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 고레브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de la Haye Baron of Errol(은)는 11267세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1289년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 Margaret Graham of Menteith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 4월 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert de la Haye 5th Lord of Erroll, Constable of Scotland nasceu em 1270, em Gorebridge, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas de la Haye Baron of Errol, tinha 11267 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Graham of Menteith em 1289, em Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em abril de 1333, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gilbert de la Haye 5th Lord of Erroll, Constable of Scotland родился в 1270 г. в местности горебридж, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas de la Haye Baron of Errol было 11267 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Graham of Menteith в 1289 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер апрель 1333 г. в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gilbert de la Haye 5th Lord of Erroll, Constable of Scotland nació en 1270, en Gorebridge, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas de la Haye Baron of Errol, tenía 11267 años y su mamá, Joan, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Margaret Graham of Menteith en 1289, en Midlothian, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en abril de 1333, a la edad de 63 años.
